basic.name: Count with filter
basic.nrql: SELECT count(*) FROM Transaction WHERE appName = 'MyApp'

basic.name: Select specific fields
basic.nrql: SELECT timestamp, message, level FROM Log

aggregations.name: Multiple aggregations
aggregations.nrql: SELECT count(*), average(duration), max(duration) FROM Transaction

facet.name: Single facet
facet.nrql: SELECT count(*) FROM Transaction FACET host

facet.name: Multiple facets
facet.nrql: SELECT count(*) FROM Transaction FACET host, status

facet.name: Facet with aggregation alias
facet.nrql: SELECT count(*) AS requests FROM Transaction FACET host

timeseries.name: Basic timeseries
timeseries.nrql: SELECT count(*) FROM Transaction TIMESERIES 5 minutes

timeseries.name: Timeseries with facet
timeseries.nrql: SELECT count(*) FROM Transaction FACET host TIMESERIES 1 hour

timeseries.name: Timeseries auto
timeseries.nrql: SELECT count(*) FROM Transaction TIMESERIES AUTO

where.name: Simple equality
where.nrql: SELECT count(*) FROM Transaction WHERE status = 200

where.name: Not equal
where.nrql: SELECT count(*) FROM Transaction WHERE status != 500

where.name: Greater than
where.nrql: SELECT count(*) FROM Transaction WHERE duration > 1000

where.name: LIKE pattern
where.nrql: SELECT count(*) FROM Transaction WHERE name LIKE '%payment%'

where.name: LIKE with dotted field name
where.nrql: SELECT count(*) FROM Span WHERE http.target LIKE '/api/%'

where.name: IN list
where.nrql: SELECT count(*) FROM Transaction WHERE status IN (200, 201, 204)

where.name: IN list with dotted field
where.nrql: SELECT count(*) FROM Span WHERE entity.guid IN ('abc123', 'def456')

where.name: IS NULL
where.nrql: SELECT count(*) FROM Transaction WHERE error IS NULL

where.name: IS NOT NULL
where.nrql: SELECT count(*) FROM Transaction WHERE error IS NOT NULL

where.name: AND condition
where.nrql: SELECT count(*) FROM Transaction WHERE status = 200 AND duration > 100

where.name: OR condition
where.nrql: SELECT count(*) FROM Transaction WHERE status = 200 OR status = 201

where.name: NOT LIKE starts with
where.nrql: SELECT count(*) FROM Log WHERE message NOT LIKE 'ADS returned%'

where.name: NOT LIKE contains
where.nrql: SELECT count(*) FROM Log WHERE message NOT LIKE '%error%'

where.name: Multiple NOT LIKE
where.nrql: SELECT count(*) FROM Log WHERE message NOT LIKE 'query:%' AND message NOT LIKE 'Calling%'

where.name: Backtick-quoted field with IN
where.nrql: SELECT count(*) FROM Log WHERE `level` IN ('info', 'warn')

orderAndLimit.name: Order by ascending
orderAndLimit.nrql: SELECT count(*) AS cnt FROM Transaction FACET host ORDER BY cnt ASC

orderAndLimit.name: Order by descending
orderAndLimit.nrql: SELECT count(*) AS cnt FROM Transaction FACET host ORDER BY cnt DESC

orderAndLimit.name: Limit
orderAndLimit.nrql: SELECT count(*) FROM Transaction FACET host LIMIT 10

orderAndLimit.name: Order and limit
orderAndLimit.nrql: SELECT count(*) AS cnt FROM Transaction FACET host ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 5

complex.name: Full query
complex.nrql: SELECT count(*), average(duration) FROM Transaction WHERE appName = 'MyApp' FACET host TIMESERIES 5 minutes

complex.name: Query with alias
complex.nrql: SELECT count(*) AS requests, average(duration) AS avg_duration FROM Transaction WHERE status = 200 FACET host, status

complex.name: Span query with entity.guid IN
complex.nrql: SELECT average(duration) FROM Span WHERE entity.guid IN ('abc123', 'def456') AND http.method IN ('GET', 'POST') FACET http.target TIMESERIES 5 minutes

unsupported.name: COMPARE WITH unparseable
unsupported.nrql: SELECT count(*) FROM Transaction COMPARE WITH last tuesday

rateFunction.name: Rate with alias
rateFunction.nrql: SELECT rate(count(*), 1 minute) AS 'API Calls Rate' FROM Span

rateFunction.name: Rate with TIMESERIES
rateFunction.nrql: SELECT rate(count(*), 1 minute) FROM Span TIMESERIES

rateFunction.name: Rate with FACET and TIMESERIES
rateFunction.nrql: SELECT rate(count(*), 1 minute) FROM Span WHERE http.route = '/api/pricing' FACET http.status_code TIMESERIES

percentageFunction.name: Basic percentage
percentageFunction.nrql: SELECT percentage(count(*), WHERE status = 200) FROM Transaction

percentageFunction.name: Percentage with alias
percentageFunction.nrql: SELECT percentage(count(http.status_code), where http.status_code > 199 and http.status_code < 300) as '2XX' from Span

percentageFunction.name: Multiple percentages
percentageFunction.nrql: SELECT percentage(count(http.status_code), where http.status_code > 199 and http.status_code < 300) as '2XX', percentage(count(http.status_code), where http.status_code > 499 and http.status_code < 600) as '5XX' from Span

limitMax.name: LIMIT MAX omitted
limitMax.nrql: SELECT count(*) FROM Span FACET host LIMIT MAX

limitMax.name: LIMIT MAX does not produce limit in DQL
limitMax.nrql: SELECT average(duration) FROM Span FACET name LIMIT MAX

casesFunction.name: CASES in FACET with two conditions
casesFunction.nrql: SELECT count(*) FROM Span FACET http.status_code, CASES(where enduser.id = 'GUESTUSER' AS guest, where enduser.id != 'GUESTUSER' AS 'customer') TIMESERIES

casesFunction.name: CASES with three conditions
casesFunction.nrql: SELECT count(*) FROM Span FACET CASES(WHERE duration < 1 AS fast, WHERE duration >= 1 AND duration < 5 AS normal, WHERE duration >= 5 AS slow)

histogramFunction.name: Histogram with FACET
histogramFunction.nrql: SELECT histogram(duration, 50, 5) FROM Span FACET service.name

funnelFunction.name: Basic funnel
funnelFunction.nrql: SELECT funnel(session, WHERE page = 'home', WHERE page = 'cart', WHERE page = 'checkout') FROM PageView

apdexFunction.name: Apdex with FACET
apdexFunction.nrql: SELECT apdex(duration, 1.0) FROM Transaction FACET appName

subqueryFunction.name: Subquery with IN
subqueryFunction.nrql: SELECT count(*) FROM Transaction WHERE host IN (SELECT uniques(host) FROM Transaction WHERE appName = 'MyApp')

slideBy.name: SLIDE BY with interval
slideBy.nrql: SELECT count(*) FROM Transaction TIMESERIES 30 minutes SLIDE BY 10 minutes

slideBy.name: SLIDE BY with FACET
slideBy.nrql: SELECT average(duration) FROM Span FACET service.name TIMESERIES 1 hour SLIDE BY 15 minutes
